# nah.tools

> Free, open-source browser tools that replace predatory SaaS. No signup, no tracking, no ads, no paywall. Most tools run entirely client-side.

## Tools

- [QR Code Generator](https://nah.tools/qr): Create QR codes for URLs, text, WiFi, vCard, email, phone, and SMS. Full style customization, batch export, and dynamic codes with editable destinations. Free forever — no expiration, no watermarks.
- [PDF Tools](https://nah.tools/pdf): Merge, split, rotate, compress, convert, watermark, and fill PDFs. 100% client-side — files never leave your device.
- [Link Shortener](https://nah.tools/links): Custom short links with click analytics, UTM builder, QR codes, and bulk creation. No signup required. Passphrase-protected management.
- [Link in Bio](https://nah.tools/bio): Create a free link-in-bio page with 6 themes. No signup, no monthly fees. Passphrase-protected editing.
- [Background Remover](https://nah.tools/photo/rm-bg): Remove image backgrounds instantly using an AI model that runs entirely in your browser. No upload to any server. No watermark.
- [Image Compression](https://nah.tools/photo/compress): Compress images by stripping metadata. Client-side processing.
- [Color Correction](https://nah.tools/photo/filters): Adjust brightness, contrast, saturation, and apply filters to photos. Client-side.
- [Data Removal](https://nah.tools/remove): Step-by-step guides and pre-filled opt-out emails to remove your personal data from 25+ data brokers.
- [Resume Builder](https://nah.tools/resume): ATS-optimized resume templates with job matching, PDF and DOCX export. Everything stays in your browser.
- [Invoice Generator](https://nah.tools/invoice): Professional invoices, estimates, receipts, and credit notes. Multi-currency, tax support, PDF and CSV export. Client-side.

## Key Facts

- Built with SvelteKit on Cloudflare Workers
- MIT-licensed open source: https://github.com/vrennat/nah-tools
- Infrastructure cost: $5/month for up to 10 million dynamic requests
- Static tools cost nothing to serve — computation happens on the user's device
- No cookies, no fingerprinting, no user accounts for static tools
- Dynamic features (short links, dynamic QR redirects, link-in-bio) use Cloudflare D1 with passphrase-based authentication

## Context

Over $2.2 billion in venture capital has gone into companies that charge subscriptions for things browsers can do for free — QR codes, PDF merges, resume exports, background removal. nah.tools is the free alternative. The name means exactly what it sounds like: the correct response to a $564/year QR code generator is "nah."
